attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_WSH_REGIONS)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.REGION_ID, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.REGION_TYPE, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.PARENT_REGION_ID, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.COUNTRY_CODE, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.COUNTRY_REGION_CODE, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.STATE_CODE, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.CITY_CODE, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.PORT_FLAG, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.AIRPORT_FLAG, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.ROAD_TERMINAL_FLAG, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.RAIL_TERMINAL_FLAG, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.LONGITUDE, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.LATITUDE, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.TIMEZONE, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.ZONE_LEVEL, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.DECONSOL_LOCATION_ID, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS,
 (
 select REGION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS
 minus
 select REGION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_WSH_REGIONS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.REGION_ID = STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.REGION_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_WSH_REGIONS.REFRESH_DATETIME
